parameters.query:
INSERT INTO game_sessions (
  session_id,
  player_name,
  current_scene,
  state_json,
  summary_text,
  is_initialized,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $("Code in JavaScript").item.json.session_id }}',
  '{{ $("Code in JavaScript").item.json.username }}',
  'intro_pending',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({
    player: {
      name: "Дэниал",
      injuries: [],
      inventory: [],
      status_effects: [],
      contracts: []
    },
    world: {
      location: null,
      time_of_day: null,
      weather: null,
      danger_level: 0
    },
    scene: {
      title: null,
      situation: null
    },
    meta: {
      turn_count: 0
    }
  }) }}',
  '',
  false,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING
  session_id,
  player_name,
  current_scene,
  state_json,
  summary_text,
  is_initialized,
  created_at,
  updated_at;

SELECT
  session_id,
  player_name,
  current_scene,
  state_json,
  summary_text,
  is_initialized,
  updated_at
FROM game_sessions
WHERE session_id = $1
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  id,
  memory_type,
  content,
  importance,
  created_at
FROM game_memories
WHERE session_id = '{{ $("session_with_turn").item.json.session_id }}'
ORDER BY importance DESC, created_at DESC
LIMIT 12;

INSERT INTO game_turns (
  session_id,
  user_id,
  username,
  user_text,
  assistant_text,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $("reply_ready").item.json.session_id }}',
  '{{ $("reply_ready").item.json.user_id }}',
  '{{ $("reply_ready").item.json.username }}',
  '{{ $("reply_ready").item.json.user_text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $("reply_ready").item.json.assistant_text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id, session_id, created_at;

UPDATE game_sessions
SET updated_at = NOW()
WHERE session_id = '{{ $("reply_ready").item.json.session_id }}'
RETURNING session_id, updated_at;

INSERT INTO game_memories (
  session_id,
  memory_type,
  content,
  importance,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $("memory_entry_prepare").item.json.session_id }}',
  '{{ $("memory_entry_prepare").item.json.memory_type }}',
  '{{ $("memory_entry_prepare").item.json.memory_content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $("memory_entry_prepare").item.json.memory_importance }},
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id, session_id, memory_type, importance, created_at;

UPDATE game_sessions
SET summary_text = RIGHT(
  TRIM(BOTH E'\n' FROM CONCAT_WS(E'\n',
    NULLIF(summary_text, ''),
    'Игрок: {{ $("reply_ready").item.json.user_text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    'ИИ: {{ $("reply_ready").item.json.assistant_text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  )),
  12000
),
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE session_id = '{{ $("reply_ready").item.json.session_id }}'
RETURNING session_id, summary_text, updated_at;

INSERT INTO game_sessions (
  session_id,
  player_name,
  current_scene,
  state_json,
  summary_text,
  is_initialized,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $("Code in JavaScript").item.json.session_id }}',
  '{{ $("Code in JavaScript").item.json.username }}',
  'intro_pending',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({
    player: {
      name: "Дэниал",
      injuries: [],
      inventory: [],
      status_effects: [],
      contracts: []
    },
    world: {
      location: null,
      time_of_day: null,
      weather: null,
      danger_level: 0
    },
    scene: {
      title: null,
      situation: null
    },
    meta: {
      turn_count: 0
    }
  }) }}',
  '',
  false,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (session_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  player_name = EXCLUDED.player_name,
  current_scene = 'intro_pending',
  state_json = EXCLUDED.state_json,
  summary_text = '',
  is_initialized = false,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING
  session_id,
  player_name,
  current_scene,
  is_initialized,
  updated_at;

parameters.text: Добро пожаловать в игру.  Сессия создана или сброшена. Теперь отправь первое игровое сообщение, чтобы начать сцену.
Сессия сброшена.  Все состояние очищено. Отправь новое игровое сообщение, чтобы начать заново.
Неизвестная команда.  Доступно: /start — создать или перезапустить сессию /reset — сбросить сессию  Или просто отправь обычное игровое сообщение.

parameters.query:
UPDATE game_sessions
SET
  is_initialized = true,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE session_id = '{{ $("reply_ready").item.json.session_id }}'
RETURNING session_id, is_initialized, updated_at;

UPDATE game_sessions
SET
  state_json = jsonb_set(
    COALESCE(state_json::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb),
    '{meta,turn_count}',
    to_jsonb(
      COALESCE((state_json::jsonb #>> '{meta,turn_count}')::int, 0) + 1
    ),
    true
  ),
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE session_id = '{{ $("reply_ready").item.json.session_id }}'
RETURNING session_id, state_json, updated_at;

parameters.text:
={{ $json.prompt_payload.system + "

" + $json.prompt_payload.context + "

Сгенерируй следующий фрагмент сцены. Не пиши за игрока. Не придумывай его реплики, действия, решения или мысли. Опиши только мир, последствия, угрозы, окружение, NPC, системные элементы и развитие ситуации после его ввода.

Ввод игрока:
" + $json.prompt_payload.user }}

assignments.name: assistant_text
assignments.value: Система на мгновение замолкает. Воздух дрожит, будто сама сцена не успела принять форму. Попробуй отправить сообщение ещё раз.

assignments.name: telegram_text
assignments.value: Система на мгновение замолкает. Воздух дрожит, будто сама сцена не успела принять форму. Попробуй отправить сообщение ещё раз.

parameters.query:
UPDATE game_sessions
SET
  state_json = '{{ $("build_state_update").item.json.next_state_json.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE session_id = '{{ $("build_state_update").item.json.session_id }}'
RETURNING session_id, state_json, updated_at;

SELECT
  id,
  user_text,
  assistant_text,
  created_at
FROM game_turns
WHERE session_id = '{{ $("session_with_turn").item.json.session_id }}'
  AND user_text NOT LIKE '/start%'
  AND user_text NOT LIKE '/reset%'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 8;

DELETE FROM game_turns
WHERE session_id = '{{ $("Code in JavaScript").item.json.session_id }}';

DELETE FROM game_memories
WHERE session_id = '{{ $("Code in JavaScript").item.json.session_id }}';

DELETE FROM game_turns
WHERE session_id = '{{ $("Code in JavaScript").item.json.session_id }}';

DELETE FROM game_memories
WHERE session_id = '{{ $("Code in JavaScript").item.json.session_id }}';

DELETE FROM game_memories
WHERE session_id = '{{ $("reply_ready").item.json.session_id }}'
  AND id NOT IN (
    SELECT id
    FROM game_memories
    WHERE session_id = '{{ $("reply_ready").item.json.session_id }}'
    ORDER BY importance DESC, created_at DESC
    LIMIT 60
  );

DELETE FROM game_turns
WHERE session_id = '{{ $("reply_ready").item.json.session_id }}'
  AND id NOT IN (
    SELECT id
    FROM game_turns
    WHERE session_id = '{{ $("reply_ready").item.json.session_id }}'
    ORDER BY created_at DESC
    LIMIT 40
  );

SELECT
  category,
  title,
  content,
  priority
FROM world_lore
WHERE is_active = TRUE
ORDER BY priority DESC, category ASC, id ASC;

SELECT name, role, faction, relation, status, notes, last_scene
FROM world_npcs
WHERE session_id = '{{ $("session_with_turn").item.json.session_id }}'
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
LIMIT 35;

SELECT name, sphere, attitude, notes, first_seen_scene
FROM world_constellations
WHERE session_id = '{{ $("session_with_turn").item.json.session_id }}'
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT name, sector, rank, attitude, notes
FROM world_hosts
WHERE session_id = '{{ $("session_with_turn").item.json.session_id }}'
ORDER BY updated_at DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT title, constellation, conditions, rewards, status, notes
FROM world_contracts
WHERE session_id = '{{ $("session_with_turn").item.json.session_id }}'
ORDER BY status ASC, updated_at DESC
LIMIT 15;

parameters.text:
={{ "Ты — анализатор игрового хода. Тебе даны последний ход игрока и последний ответ ведущего. Извлеки из них только новые сущности, которые стоит запомнить надолго: NPC по имени, Созвездия по имени, Ведущих по имени, активные или новые контракты.

Отвечай строго в JSON без какого-либо текста до или после. Структура:
{
  "npcs": [{"name": "", "role": "", "faction": "", "relation": "", "status": "alive", "notes": "", "last_scene": ""}],
  "constellations": [{"name": "", "sphere": "", "attitude": "", "notes": "", "first_seen_scene": ""}],
  "hosts": [{"name": "", "sector": "", "rank": "", "attitude": "", "notes": ""}],
  "contracts": [{"title": "", "constellation": "", "conditions": "", "rewards": "", "status": "active", "notes": ""}]
}

Правила:
- Никогда не добавляй Дэниала в npcs.
- Включай только сущности, у которых есть конкретное имя или название.
- Если ничего нового нет — верни все 4 массива пустыми.
- Никакого текста вне JSON.

Ход игрока:
" + ($("reply_ready").item.json.user_text || "") + "

Ответ ведущего:
" + ($("reply_ready").item.json.assistant_text || "") }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO world_npcs (session_id, name, role, faction, relation, status, notes, last_scene, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.session_id }}',
  '{{ $json.name }}',
  '{{ $json.role }}',
  '{{ $json.faction }}',
  '{{ $json.relation }}',
  '{{ $json.status }}',
  '{{ $json.notes }}',
  '{{ $json.last_scene }}',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (session_id, name) DO UPDATE SET
  role = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.role, ''), world_npcs.role),
  faction = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.faction, ''), world_npcs.faction),
  relation = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.relation, ''), world_npcs.relation),
  status = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.status, ''), world_npcs.status),
  notes = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.notes, ''), world_npcs.notes),
  last_scene = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.last_scene, ''), world_npcs.last_scene),
  updated_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO world_constellations (session_id, name, sphere, attitude, notes, first_seen_scene, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.session_id }}',
  '{{ $json.name }}',
  '{{ $json.sphere }}',
  '{{ $json.attitude }}',
  '{{ $json.notes }}',
  '{{ $json.first_seen_scene }}',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (session_id, name) DO UPDATE SET
  sphere = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.sphere, ''), world_constellations.sphere),
  attitude = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.attitude, ''), world_constellations.attitude),
  notes = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.notes, ''), world_constellations.notes),
  first_seen_scene = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.first_seen_scene, ''), world_constellations.first_seen_scene),
  updated_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO world_hosts (session_id, name, sector, rank, attitude, notes, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.session_id }}',
  '{{ $json.name }}',
  '{{ $json.sector }}',
  '{{ $json.rank }}',
  '{{ $json.attitude }}',
  '{{ $json.notes }}',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (session_id, name) DO UPDATE SET
  sector = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.sector, ''), world_hosts.sector),
  rank = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.rank, ''), world_hosts.rank),
  attitude = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.attitude, ''), world_hosts.attitude),
  notes = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.notes, ''), world_hosts.notes),
  updated_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO world_contracts (session_id, title, constellation, conditions, rewards, status, notes, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.session_id }}',
  '{{ $json.title }}',
  '{{ $json.constellation }}',
  '{{ $json.conditions }}',
  '{{ $json.rewards }}',
  '{{ $json.status }}',
  '{{ $json.notes }}',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (session_id, title) DO UPDATE SET
  constellation = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.constellation, ''), world_contracts.constellation),
  conditions = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.conditions, ''), world_contracts.conditions),
  rewards = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.rewards, ''), world_contracts.rewards),
  status = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.status, ''), world_contracts.status),
  notes = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.notes, ''), world_contracts.notes),
  updated_at = NOW();
